channel.title: YOUSSEF JAD | THE DIGITAL PORTER
channel.description: Recent content on YOUSSEF JAD | THE DIGITAL PORTER

item.title: I Lost My Mother. A Video Game Helped Me Carry the Weight.
item.description: I don’t think grief works that way — you don’t pass it, you carry it. Some days the weight is manageable. Most nights it isn’t.

item.title: My AI coding agent is hallucinating. Here is the road to fix it.
item.description: As a Tech Lead, my day is a constant battle of context-switching. In this era, we have the Power of Thanos in our hands with LLMs and AI Agents. But that power is a double-edged sword. The main enemy? Hallucinations.

item.title: Stop Killing Your Database Performance: The Magic of Functional Indexing in MySQL
item.description: In the intricate realm of backend architecture and database optimization, an index is your best weapon for accelerating data retrieval. Most developers know the basics of indexing, but what happens when your perfectly indexed query suddenly betrays you and executes a Full Table Scan?

item.title: You're Paying a Huge Performance Tax on Your JSON Columns. Here's the One-Line Fix.
item.description: You stored it in JSON for flexibility. That flexibility is now costing you full table scans on every filter. Virtual columns are the escape hatch you didn’t know existed.

item.title: Just start. Then — 'Here we go.' :D
item.description: Ah, the nightmare of selecting a blogging system — too many choices. Should I get a domain? Should I custom build it? Overthinking is killing me, and overengineering is right around the corner, turning my weekend into a nightmare.

item.title: Scope Creep: How Projects Die in Silence
item.description: The meeting started at 2 PM. By 2:15, your 8-week project became a 12-week project. Nobody called it out. Nobody documented it. It just… happened. This is scope creep. It doesn’t arrive with a bang. It arrives in whispers.
